name: Time Based Key-Value Store
description: Design a time-based key-value data structure that can store multiple values for the same key at different timestamps and retrieve the key's value at a certain timestamp. Implement set(key, value, timestamp) and get(key, timestamp) which returns the value with the largest timestamp <= the given timestamp.
constraints: 1 <= key.length, value.length <= 100. 1 <= timestamp <= 10^7. All timestamps of set are strictly increasing. At most 2 * 10^5 calls to set and get.
